subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! I was most pleased with the opening words of the letter you sent through Maḥmúd, that praiseworthy soul, and those words are “O ʻAbdu’l-Baha!”
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده خدا نامه ایکه بواسطه جناب محمود محمود فرستادی عنوان بسیار مقبول شد و
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
